outlook.summary: Market is trapped in a tight premium-selling range. Massive positive GEX across all expiries indicates dealer long gamma, suppressing volatility. Heavy put loading (PCR > 2.0 in weekly/monthly) establishes a strong floor, while sequential call walls cap the upside. Expect structural pinning near the money with defended support below.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Dominant Call OI across 0DTE (7767), WEEKLY (8578), and MONTHLY (13935). Ultimate structural resistance where dealers hold massive short calls.
RESONANCE: Heavy Call OI in 0DTE (6367), WEEKLY (6044), and MONTHLY (21342). Immediate resistance directly above the current spot price.
CONFLUENCE: Massive Call OI in MONTHLY (93735) acts as a magnet, while Put OI in 0DTE (4811) and WEEKLY (4975) defends the downside. Aligns with Monthly Gamma Flip at 6999.28.
CONFLUENCE: Weekly Gamma Flip level combined with 0DTE Max Pain (7050) and massive 0DTE Put volume (26,960 at 7050). Strong equilibrium and dealer hedging pivot.
CONFLUENCE: Significant Put OI in WEEKLY (7462) and MONTHLY (16689). Deep institutional support level.
MONTHLY Put Wall with massive OI (43566) aligning with the Monthly Max Pain (6825). Represents the ultimate structural floor for the broader trend.
0DTE CALL WALL with huge volume (33324) and OI (7870). Represents the immediate intraday resistance cap above spot.
0DTE Max Pain level with heavy Put volume (26960). Dealers will actively defend this level to expiries options worthless.

outlook.summary: The market exhibits a bullish structure characterized by positive GEX and a reverse smirk skew in the 0DTE expiration. A massive Call Resonance at 26700 acts as a magnet and ceiling right at the spot price, while substantial Put OI is concentrated significantly lower at 26100 and 25700. Expect subdued volatility with a upward structural bias supported by dealer hedging flows.

Strong Put OI concentration in 0DTE (103) and Monthly (222) expirations, representing the first major structural support level.
Dominant 0DTE Put OI (622) aligning exactly with the Weekly Max Pain, acting as the ultimate downside anchor and structural floor.
